occurrence_sentence: Q-CTRL will partner with the United States Geological Survey (USGS) to explore potential quantum computing and sensing applications for geological sciences.
Q-CTRL will partner with the United States Geological Survey (USGS) to explore potential quantum computing and sensing applications for geological sciences.

Q-CTRL, a global leader in developing useful quantum technologies through quantum control infrastructure software, has entered a pioneering partnership with the United States Geological Survey (USGS) to explore potential quantum computing and sensing applications for geological sciences.

interaction_phrase: has entered a pioneering partnership with
occurrence_sentence: Q-CTRL, a global leader in developing useful quantum technologies through quantum control infrastructure software, has entered a pioneering partnership with the United States Geological Survey (USGS) to explore potential quantum computing and sensing applications for geological sciences.
"Q-CTRL is excited to deliver a new generation of quantum technologies to an agency as essential as the USGS," said Q-CTRL CEO and Founder Michael J. Biercuk.
Q-CTRL is excited to deliver a new generation of quantum technologies to an agency as essential as the USGS,
We are thrilled to be delivering transformational new capabilities with this important partner, and truly pushing the limits of human capabilities.

Looking toward a future where quantum technology is seamlessly integrated into environmental science and geophysics, this collaboration is a foundational step toward developing practical applications for a broad range of national and global challenges.

interaction_phrase: integrating Q-CTRL's groundbreaking quantum technology with USGS operations
occurrence_sentence: By integrating Q-CTRL's groundbreaking quantum technology with USGS operations, the partners aim to set a new benchmark in geophysical exploration and environmental monitoring – both on Earth and beyond.
This is a frontier that will require public, private and international partners together to explore, and we are delighted to be exploring with Q-CTRL.
"Q-CTRL is excited to deliver a new generation of quantum technologies to an agency as essential as the USGS," said Q-CTRL CEO and Founder Michael J. Biercuk.

interaction_phrase: Q-CTRL and the USGS will embark on workshops and field investigations
occurrence_sentence: In the spirit of collaborative innovation, Q-CTRL and the USGS will embark on workshops and field investigations to fully exploit quantum technologies' capabilities.
